items.title: Hyerin Cho wins 2026 Eric R. Keto Prize for Graduate Students in Theoretical Astrophysics
items.excerpt: Congratulations to Dr. Heryin Cho for winning the 2026 Eric R. Keto Prize for Graduate Students in Theoretical Astrophysics for her thesis "Black Hole Accretion and Feedback: From the Event Horizon to Galactic Scales" (Advisor: Ramesh Narayan). The Keto...

items.title: Galileo Project Receives Donation
items.excerpt: The Galileo Project, led by Professor Avi Loeb, ITC director, was awarded $260,000 in support of its research mission: The goal of the Galileo Project is to bring the search for extraterrestrial technological signatures of Extraterrestrial Technological...

items.title: Ghosting the Galaxy: The Star That Left Without Saying Goodbye
items.excerpt: ITC members Morgan MacLeod , Lecturer in Astronomy at Harvard, and Avi Loeb , Frank B. Baird, Jr., Professor of Science at Harvard and Director of the Institute for Theory and Computation (ITC), contributed to the announcement in Science on February 12...

items.title: 3–2! ITC Soccer Tradition Lives On
items.excerpt: ITC Soccer Cup took place on Saturday, August 16, 2024, at Harvard's Cumnock Field. The match pitted faculty and post-docs against graduate students. For the first time in several years, the graduate students won! Thank you to everyone who participated in...

items.title: Meet "Betelbuddy"
items.excerpt: After more than a century of anticipation, astronomers have now directly imaged what appears to be a long-hypothesized companion star to Betelgeuse , the red supergiant in Orion’s shoulder. The discovery comes on the heels of predictions made by members...

items.title: Jesse Han wins 2025 Eric R. Keto Prize for Graduate Students in Theoretical Astrophysics
items.excerpt: Congratulations to Jiwon (Jesse) Han for winning the 2025 Eric R. Keto Prize for Graduate Students in Theoretical Astrophysics for thesis "The Galactic Halo in Stars and Shadows" (Advisor: Charlie Conroy). The Keto Prize, endowed with a generous donation...

items.title: ITC Soccer Match
items.excerpt: ITC Soccer Cup took place on July 27, 2024 at Harvard's Jordan Field. The soccer match was faculty vs graduate students. The faculty won.

items.title: Paper published on "A possible direct exposure of the Earth to the cold dense interstellar medium 2–3 Myr ago"
items.excerpt: Read the story in the Harvard Gazette, Harvard Magazine, and the scientific article in Nature magazine, p ublished by Merav Opher, Avi Loeb, and J. E. G. Peek.

items.title: ITC Conference: To Our Cosmic Horizon and Beyond: A Celebration of 20 Years of the Institute for Theory and Computation
ITC faculty make up for the top of the ScholarGPS ranks in Astronomy
items.excerpt: Three of our faculty make up numbers 2, 6, and 14 in the Astronomy ranking worldwide of all times. A truly remarkable accomplishment for the ITC. To see the list, click here.

items.title: Anna Rosen receives Assistant Professor at UCSD!!
items.excerpt: Former ITC Postdoc Anna Rosen was promoted to Assistant Professor of Astronomy at UCSD
